sections.content:
Looking at the current image, the character is now very close to the green U-shape. The white body is overlapping with the green U-shape. The red feet are visible at the bottom of the white body.
Let me check the current state to see if the character is aligned with the green U-shape.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
current_seg = current_frame.segmentation
whites = [n for n in current_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 10]
reds = [n for n in current_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
greens = [n for n in current_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']

print("White body:")
for w in whites:
    rows = [p[0] for p in w['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in w['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={w['pixels']}")

print("\nRed feet:")
for r in reds:
    rows = [p[0] for p in r['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in r['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={r['pixels']}")

print("\nGreen shape:")
for g in greens:
    rows = [p[0] for p in g['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in g['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={g['pixels']}")

print(f"\nGame over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', 'N/A')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
